data.title: Ethereum posts biggest weekly gain in 4 years as Bitcoin, XRP, and SOL surge
data.description:
Ethereum just pulled off the wildest comeback it’s had in four years. This week, the second-biggest crypto jumped 25%, the largest weekly gain it’s posted since May 2021. The rally didn’t happen in isolation. The entire crypto market heated up, and Bitcoin led the charge—holding its ground well above $100,000. At press time, Bitcoin stood […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/ethereum-posts-biggest-weekly-gain-in-4-yrs/

data.title: Bitcoin price rallies as global liquidity growth accelerates — Analysts
data.description:
Key takeaways:Bitcoin’s price closely tracks global liquidity growth, with liquidity explaining up to 90% of its price movements, according to Raoul Pal. In the long term, global liquidity continues to expand, driven by the increasing debt levels in many countries. On a shorter timeframe, global liquidity follows a cyclical pattern, with Michael Howell projecting the current cycle to peak by mid-2026. Bitcoin (BTC) price is notoriously sensitive to global liquidity
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/bitcoin-price-rallies-as-global-liquidity-growth-accelerates-analysts?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Founder of Crypto Lending Platform Celsius Sentenced to 12 Years in Prison for Fraud
data.description:
The founder of the collapsed crypto platform Celsius has been sentenced to 12 years behind bars. Alexander Mashinsky was initially arrested in July 2023 on charges of violating securities law by the U. S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC)
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/05/09/founder-of-crypto-lending-platform-celsius-sentenced-to-12-years-in-prison-for-fraud/

data.title: Russia slates crypto mining ban expansion, readies new rules
data.description:
Authorities in Russia plan to expand a ban on crypto mining introduced in parts of the country to cover more regions experiencing electricity shortages. The restrictions, initially seasonal and limited to a few power-deficit areas, have already become permanent in over a dozen regions, with more to be affected soon. Russian government to ban mining […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/russia-slates-crypto-mining-ban-expansion-readies-new-rules/

data.title: US Stablecoin Legislation Halts in Senate Amid Partisan Bickering
data.description:
A bill designed to overhaul stablecoin regulation in the US halted in the Senate amid partisan negotiations. Senator Bill Hagerty (R-TN) introduced the Guiding and Establishing National Innovation for US Stablecoins (GENIUS) Act in February. The potential legislation would require stablecoin issuers to maintain backing for their assets on a 1:1 ratio
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/05/09/us-stablecoin-legislation-halts-in-senate-amid-partisan-bickering/

data.title: Scott Bessent Slams 48-49 Senate Snub – Will GENIUS Act Failure Cost U.S. Crypto Crown?
data.description:
Scott Bessent has warned that the Senate’s May 8 failure to advance the GENIUS Act has left U. S. stablecoin regulation fragmented and could push digital‑asset development overseas, as Democrats cited AML and national security concerns in narrowly blocking the bill, threatening dollar dominance. The post Scott Bessent Slams 48-49 Senate Snub – Will GENIUS Act Failure Cost U
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/treasury-secretary-scott-bessent-slams-senates-decision-to-block-genius-stablecoin-bill/

data.title: eXch Crackdown: German Police Seize $38M Linked to $1.4B Bybit Hack
data.description:
Germany’s Federal Criminal Police Office and Frankfurt prosecutors have seized €34 million in mixed crypto from eXch and shut its servers, stating the privacy-centric swap service has processed large portions of the Bybit hack’s $1. 4 billion haul and other funds linked to Lazarus Group and CSAM networks. The post eXch Crackdown: German Police Seize $38M Linked to $1
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/germany-seizes-38m-exch-linked-to-bybit-hack/

data.title: Ark Invest CEO Cathie Wood Doubles Down on Bitcoin Prediction, Says Base Case Target for BTC Remains $700,000
data.description:
ARK Invest CEO Cathie Wood says that Bitcoin (BTC) remains on track to hit a price target of at least $700,000 within years. In a new interview on CNBC’s Squawk Box, Wood says ARK continues to predict Bitcoin will increase at least 580% of its current value by 2030.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/05/09/ark-invest-ceo-cathie-wood-doubles-down-on-bitcoin-prediction-says-base-case-target-for-btc-remains-700000/

data.description: According to BlockBeats, U.S. Vice President Vance is scheduled to deliver a speech at the Bitcoin 2025 Conference. The event is expected to draw significant attention from the cryptocurrency community and industry leaders.

data.title: Stocks Slip As Gold Rebounds To $3,330, Bitcoin Holds $102,000: What's Driving Markets Friday?
data.description:
Wall Street traded slightly lower by midday Friday, as investors adopted a wait-and-see stance ahead of a potential trade breakthrough, with high-stakes negotiations between U. S. officials—led by Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent—and Chinese authorities set to unfold over the weekend. 
source: https://www.benzinga.com/25/05/45325659/stocks-ease-gold-rebounds-to-3330-bitcoins-holds-102000-whats-driving-markets-friday?utm_source=cryptopanic.com&utm_campaign=partner_feed&utm_medium=partner_feed&utm_content=site
